Meaning: Abstract superclass for all roadmap phases.
Truth role: No truth role by itself; subclasses determine whether the phase may touch Lean, tooling, documentation, DB or reference material.
Allowed consumers: Only used by generated validators/tables.

Meaning: Direct Lean mathematical/content derivation phase.
Truth role: May eventually create or close checked Lean objects, but only after derived-only release evidence.
Allowed consumers: Lean implementation prompt, object proof dossier, downstream phases after closure.

Meaning: Lean code/API/name/import-surface refactor phase without new mathematical content by itself.
Truth role: Preserves/reorganizes checked code; does not prove new mathematics unless separately registered.
Allowed consumers: Build/refactor workflow and later Lean phases after regression checks.

Meaning: Policy/release/import/consumer-governance phase that controls Lean work but is not itself a Lean theorem.
Truth role: Planning authority only; must not be cited as mathematical proof.
Allowed consumers: Implementation prompts and generated validators.

Meaning: External established-theory or side-theory comparison/target gate.
Truth role: Comparison/reference only; never CNNA generator or input.
Allowed consumers: Scratchpads, review gates and later consistency checks after CNNA-derived data exists.

Meaning: Python/YAML/generator/schema/tooling phase.
Truth role: Generated-secondary tooling; cannot release Lean mathematical claims.
Allowed consumers: Documentation tool, exporters, future DB mirror.

Meaning: Provider-neutral SQL/public-read mirror or frontend publication phase.
Truth role: Read/query/publication mirror only; not a truth source.
Allowed consumers: Public API/frontend/review tooling after snapshot/checksum rules.

Meaning: PDF/TSV/DOT/README/package generated-output phase.
Truth role: Rendering/navigation/release packaging only.
Allowed consumers: Readers, documentation exports, release packages.

Meaning: Human-readable documentation, review matrix, no-infallibility statement, or manual workflow phase.
Truth role: Interpretive documentation; expert review required.
Allowed consumers: Reviewers and future tool/database views.

Meaning: Frozen baseline or package state phase.
Truth role: Records baseline identity only.
Allowed consumers: Regression comparison and package history.

Meaning: Abstract superclass for all registered objects/quantities/control artifacts.
Truth role: No truth role by itself; subclasses determine whether the row is Lean, target, tool, DB, reference, generated or governance.
Allowed consumers: Object register/proofbook validators.

Meaning: Object has an existing Lean source/seed or canonical Lean module site.
Truth role: Potential checked-code object; exact semantic status still governed by Object status and proof dossier.
Allowed consumers: Lean phases subject to import/consumer discipline.

Meaning: Planned or future Lean object/candidate, not a checked final object yet.
Truth role: Target only until implemented and proof-checked.
Allowed consumers: Planning/proof rehearsal; not public-final.

Meaning: Lean-facing refactor, notation, facade, quarantine or import-surface object. It may point to Lean modules, but its semantic role is reorganization/compatibility rather than new mathematics.
Truth role: Code-shape object only; preserves or exposes checked code and must not be cited as a new derived mathematical theorem.
Allowed consumers: Lean refactor phases, regression checks and downstream phases after build-compatible migration evidence.

Meaning: Lean-facing handoff/input/output contract object. It controls access between pillars or phase layers and may have a Lean target module, but it is not itself the mathematical data transported by the handoff.
Truth role: Interface/consumer-rights object; downstream phases may consume only the separately registered LeanSourceObject or LeanTargetObject data named by the contract.
Allowed consumers: Handoff validators, pillar-boundary phases and later Lean phases subject to access rights.

Meaning: Lean-facing policy/audit object whose natural representation may be a Lean module or proof-carrying record, while the content remains governance rather than mathematical CNNA data.
Truth role: Checked governance/audit boundary if implemented; never a substitute for a derived mathematical object.
Allowed consumers: Static audits, import/consumer discipline, release gates and implementation prompts.

Meaning: Policy, ledger, guardrail, release, import or consumer-control object.
Truth role: Controls work; does not constitute mathematical CNNA data.
Allowed consumers: Implementation prompts, validators and review checklists.

Meaning: External theory/reference/comparison/target-gate object.
Truth role: Comparison-only; never ontic or generative CNNA input.
Allowed consumers: Scratchpads and later consistency gates after CNNA-derived objects exist.

Meaning: YAML/schema/script/export/tooling object.
Truth role: Generated-secondary/tooling; cannot be mistaken for Lean object.
Allowed consumers: Documentation tool and future database importer.

Meaning: Provider-neutral SQL/frontend/read-only mirror object.
Truth role: Publication/query mirror only; never Lean/YAML truth replacement.
Allowed consumers: Public read-only API/frontend/review tooling.

Meaning: PDF/TSV/DOT/README/package output or generated rendering contract.
Truth role: Rendering/navigation artifact; semantically reviewable and secondary.
Allowed consumers: Readers and release packages.

Meaning: Documentation/review statement or expert-review object.
Truth role: Interpretive; expert review remains required.
Allowed consumers: Reviewers and documentation slices.

Meaning: An object whose content governs object currency, supersession, rename/delete history, successor pointers and historical provenance.
Truth role: planning/tooling governance; not Lean truth and not a CNNA generator
Allowed consumers: Explorer schema, SQL mirror, history timeline, object register/proofbook generators and review workflows

Meaning: Phase that scans or migrates uploaded legacy code as reference/migration evidence only.
Truth role: Secondary code-evidence layer: useful for target gates and regression ideas, but not CNNA truth and not direct Lean-source authority.
Allowed consumers: Planning, Explorer, future migration phases and expert review; Lean consumers only after a derived-only source map and new CNNA implementation exist.

Meaning: Object/ledger recording legacy-code structures, migration dispositions, risks or regression targets.
Truth role: Reference/migration object, never a CNNA-derived theorem/object by itself.
Allowed consumers: Planning, Explorer, migration ledgers and review. CNNA Lean phases may consume only its audited target obligations, not its legacy code as source.
